title: Boot Boot!
content:
Note to self: NEVER press Shift-Ctrl-Option-Power together  %(rem)meaning: at the same time%  on the iBook again. It resets the power setting (or something of that sort), turn off the machine immediately  **-- without warning!**  Turn it on again and the date is reset to 1/1/1970. :P

... SO CRUEL!  %(me)I should know about this one but, oh well, I do forget!%

Anyway, I have to enter this entry directly to MySQL because TBOX backend is offline for the moment. Guess I have another excuse not to write something for a little while. :)
